title: In Loving Memory Verse Graveside Memorial Grave Spiked Flower Vase (Mum, White with Robin Design)
seller_info_text: The Party Store Girl / Special Memories
features: Ideal for fresh or silk flowers and comes with plastic top that helps when arranging your flowers. Is easily pushed into the ground due to the spike at the base.
A good quality black British made vase with gold lettering, made from a tough durable plastic to withstand the weather.
Vase ground spike with gold detail lettering, suitable for outdoor use in all weather conditions.
Plastic Construction, Weatherproof and Frostproof. Size: 33cm Including Spike
Perfect for fresh or dried flowers and includes a perfect insert which helps to arrange your flowers and keeps them neat and upright when arranging your own memorial remembrance display
description: Create a beautiful and touching memorial for your loved ones with our Special Verse Graveside Memorial Grave Spiked Flower Vase. This pack includes a plastic vase with a spike designed to securely hold flowers in place at the gravesite. The vase is adorned with the loving message In Loving Memory, making it a poignant tribute to those who have passed. Our grave flower pots are perfect for honoring the memory of your loved ones, providing a lasting and elegant display of their favorite blooms. The spike ensures that the vase stays firmly in place, even in windy conditions, so you can have peace of mind knowing that your tribute will remain undisturbed. These beautiful memorial vases for graves make lovely gifts for those looking to remember a special person who has touched their lives. Whether you’re looking for dad memorial gifts, mum and dad grave ornaments, brother or nan and grandad grave ornaments, these plastic vases for flowers are the perfect way to add personal touches to the gravesite. Our cemetery vases with spikes offer a practical yet meaningful way to keep fresh flowers looking their best, while also providing comfort and solace during visits to the cemetery. Honor your loved ones with our graveside flower holders and create a lasting tribute that speaks from the heart.
